raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I requested a balance transfer from XXXX to Citibank. I told the individual my XXXX credit card number, and she took the number. I called XXXX a few times to see if the transfer was completed and they said no. I called Citibank on XX/XX/year> and was told it was completed. No it wasn't as the transfer was never completed.They told me yes it was. I gave CItibank my credit card number and they told me it was incorrect. I told thenm only card. Then I was told an investigation would be open. I was never given a investigative number, I was told to contact USAA and ask for the bank to correct it. I was given the individuals credit card number that the last 4 was similar to mine. They have done nothing, but investigate themselves and clear themselves of any wrong doing instead of correcting the action.
